# Coverage badge snippet

This file holds the coverage badge markdown that the future README polish phase
will paste into the project README. It is intentionally kept out of the actual
README until that phase happens, so the docs branch can focus only on
documentation changes.

```markdown
![CI](https://github.com/<owner>/sunroom-crm-angular/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg)
![Coverage](https://img.shields.io/badge/coverage-100%25-brightgreen)
```

Replace `<owner>` with the GitHub organization or user that owns the repository
when the badge is moved into the README. The CI badge is generated by GitHub
Actions automatically; the coverage badge is a static shield.io badge that
matches the 100% gate enforced inside `angular.json`'s coverage thresholds.
